title: Pre-trained Models Path
description: Build fluency in Pre-trained Models inside Neural Networks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: NAT-Base
steps.summary: NAT-Base belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Neural Networks / Pre-trained Models. Start after Base Model.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Successor Representations
steps.summary: Successor Representations belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Neural Networks / Pre-trained Models. Compare it with Universal Successor Representations and vectorized representations. It opens into Universal Successor Representations.
